title: Florida man dressed as Uncle Sam travels the country from Trump rally to Trump rally
shortDescription: Uncle Sam is having fun traveling to multiple Trump rallies across the U.S.

title: Donald Trump pledges to make US 'crypto capital of the planet'
shortDescription: The three-day Bitcoin2024 conference, headlined by Donald Trump, ended Saturday, July 27, 2024 at Music City Center in downtown Nashville.

title: Election Day is 100 days away: When does early voting start in each state?
shortDescription: Election Day 2024 may be 100 days away, but voting starts sooner than that in states like Pennsylvania, Virginia and Illinois.

title: House Dems tie Project 2025 to GOP with 100 days until election
shortDescription: House Democrats' campaign arm is seeking to tie swing district Republicans to the sweeping conservative policy playbook.

title: TikTok sell-or-be-banned law safeguards national security, DOJ says
shortDescription: The Justice Department defended a law that could result in TikTok's US ban in a Friday court filing, saying it's about national security, not speech.

title: Trump tells Christians they 'won't have to vote anymore,' if he wins
shortDescription: The GOP presidential nominee delivered the comments during a keynote speech at Turning Point Action’s Believers’ Summit.

title: New body cam video shows start of investigation into Trump shooter
shortDescription: Body cam scenes were captured in the chaotic minutes after Thomas Matthew Crooks took aim at former President Donald Trump on July 13.

title: Voters will get to weigh in on abortion — in red and blue states alike
shortDescription: Organizers in both blue and red states have gathered enough signatures to put abortion on the ballot in November.

title: Gerontocracy's last gasp? How Biden's exit could alter US leadership.
shortDescription: Biden's departure from the 2024 race could signal the beginning of the end of aging leadership in the U.S.

title: How Donald Trump uses supporters' money to delay his trials
shortDescription: Donald Trump's fundraising pays for wide-ranging legal battles sometimes criticized as frivolous but occasionally whittling away charges against him.

title: A bullet from a sniper's rifle caused Trump's ear injury, FBI confirms
shortDescription: After nearly two weeks of vague statements that prompted criticism, the lead investigation agency in Trump's near-assassination issues statement

title: Registered voters in Hawaii should receive a mail ballot and secrecy sleeve by July 23.

title: How will history remember President Joe Biden? | The Excerpt
shortDescription: What led to his unprecedented decision to bow out of the presidential race and what will his legacy be?

title: Video of profane Biden speech is fabricated | Fact check
shortDescription: The video is a fabrication that was first posted to X, formerly Twitter, by a social media user who shares memes and other manipulated content.

title: Netanyahu pays visit to Trump at Mar-a-Lago
shortDescription: It was the first meeting between the leaders since former President Donald Trump left the White House in 2021.

title: Voters register en masse after Harris enters the race
shortDescription: The last two weeks of campaign drama, including Kamala Harris joining the race, have inspired Gen Z and millennial voters to register in huge numbers.
